name: Export search console results to Google Sheets with AI analysis
description: Scrapes a website with Firecrawl to identify SEO content, uses Claude AI to analyze search performance patterns and generate SEO recommendations, saves structured reports to Google Sheets, and notifies Slack with key findings.

source.originalName: Export search console results to Google Sheets

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for website scraping

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for SEO reports

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for SEO report delivery

focusKeywords.description: Comma-separated target keywords to focus on

steps.name: Scrape website for SEO analysis with Firecrawl
Extract website content for SEO analysis
Build Claude prompt for SEO analysis
Build spreadsheet data for SEO report
Save SEO report to Google Sheets
